fake stay order copies received from the advocate Thangapandian 
through P. Meiyappan’s email. Thereafter, C4 prepared the fake stay 
order copies and handed over the same to the accused, Thangamani, 
Sundaram and Angamuthu through P. Meiyappan. C4 further stated 
in his confession statement to the CBCID that Contemnor No. 7/S. 
Amal Raj9 is the person who floated the idea of preparing the forged 
High Court stay orders. The properties were seized from the Digital 
Net Centre, Bhavani where the fake stay orders were prepared 
and the same were sent to the FSL. The High Court has extracted 
the report of the FSL in para 30 of the impugned order. Moreover, 
C3 in his affidavit has alleged that C4 was the person who guided 
them throughout in the litigation and it was he (C4) who handed 
over fake orders through P. Meiyappan. Paragraph Nos. 12, 13, 15 
& 16 of his affidavit have been reproduced by the High Court which
